quality.rationale: 基于狭义相对论四矢量模方不变量与质心系定义的标准运动学推导，逻辑链条完整且可推广至任意能量质量的两体碰撞场景

origin.question: Problem 2.11. Consider the reaction $1 + 2 \\rightarrow 3 + 4$ . The lab frame is defined to be the one in which $\underline{\\mathbf{P}}_2 = 0$ . The C.M. frame is defined to be the one in which $\underline{\\mathbf{P}}_1^{\\mathbf{C.M.}} + \\underline{\\mathbf{P}}_2^{\\mathbf{C.M.}} = 0$ . Show that:\n(c) $\mathbf{P}_1^{\\mathbf{C},\\mathbf{M}.} = \\mathfrak{m}_2\\mathbf{P}_1 / \\mathbf{E}_{\\mathrm{total}}^{\\mathbf{C},\\mathbf{M}.}$.
origin.solution:
(c) By using the result of part (b) we have
$$
\begin{array}{l} \left(\mathbf {P}_{1}^{\mathbf {C . M .}}\right)^{2} = \left(\mathbf {E}_{1}^{\mathbf {C . M .}}\right)^{2} - \mathbf {m}_{1}^{2} = \left(\frac {\mathbf {m}_{1}^{2} + \mathbf {E}_{1} \mathbf {m}_{2}}{\mathbf {E}_{\mathrm {t o t}}^{\mathbf {C . M .}}}\right)^{2} - \mathbf {m}_{1}^{2} \\\ = \cdot \frac {\left(m_{1}^{2} + E_{1} m_{2}\right)^{2} - m_{1}^{2} \left(m_{1}^{2} + m_{2}^{2} + 2 E_{1} m_{2}\right)}{\left(E_{\text {t o t}}^{C . M .}\right)^{2}} = \frac {m_{2}^{2} \left(E_{1}^{2} - m_{1}^{2}\right)}{\left(E_{\text {t o t}}^{C . M .}\right)^{2}} = \frac {m_{2}^{2} P_{1}^{2}}{\left(E_{\text {t o t}}^{C . M .}\right)^{2}}, \\ \end{array}
$$
and therefore $\mathbf{P}_1^{\mathbf{C},\mathbf{M}.} = \mathfrak{m}_2\mathbf{P}_1 / \mathbf{E}_{\mathrm{total}}^{\mathbf{C},\mathbf{M}.}$.
